topics: Basics of pattern recognition system - Introduction
classification of pattern recognition systems. Design of Pattern recognition system
Pattern recognition Life Cycle. Statistical Pattern Recognition - Review of probability theory
Optimal solutions for minimum error and minimum risk criteria
Bayesian parameter estimation. Concept of feature extraction and dimensionality
Dimension reduction methods - Fisher discriminant analysis
Non-Parameter methods - Non-parametric techniques for density estimation - Parzen-window method
K-Nearest Neighbour method. Non-metric methods for pattern classification - Non-numeric data or nominal data. Decision trees
pruning. Linear Discriminant based algorithm - Perceptron
Algorithms for clustering: K-means and Hierarchical methods
